---
title: "Get in touch!📬"
---
## Let's work together

I care about open science, collaboration, and building a kind, supportive space where both people and good research can grow.

If you're curious, excited about research, or simply want to exchange ideas, feel free to reach out.

<center>
  <a href="mailto:pachecoriano.c@gmail.com?subject=Subject&body=Body%20Text" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button">
    <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> Email Me
  </a>
</center>

<br>
<p style="text-align: center;">*Hope to hear from you soon!* 🌿</p>
